title: armeria ebracteata
intro: Armeria ebracteata, also known as the Alpine Sea Pink, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is a member of the Plumbaginaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions, thanks to its health benefits such as soothing coughs and promoting wound healing. Armeria ebracteata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, making it a versatile ingredient in traditional herbal medicine.
